segments.text: In my distress I cried to the Lord, And He heard me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Deliver my soul, O Lord, from lying lips And from a deceitful tongue.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: What shall be given to you, Or what shall be done to you, You false tongue?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Sharp arrows of the warrior, With coals of the broom tree!
Woe is me, that I dwell in Meshech, That I dwell among the tents of Kedar!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My soul has dwelt too long With one who hates peace.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I am for peace; But when I speak, they are for war.
segments.speaker: David
